name: Crockpot Chicken Parisienne
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dry white wine or vermouth
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken breasts lightly with salt, pepper, and paprika.
2. Place the chicken in the Crock-Pot.
3. Mix white wine, cream of mushroom soup, and mushrooms until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Add a little more paprika on top.
6. Cover and cook on low for 7 to 9 hours (or high for 3 to 4 hours).
7. Remove the chicken and stir in the sour cream mixture during the last 30 minutes of cooking.
8. Serve the sauce over the chicken with rice or noodles.
